'''Lobb Gerido''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who was [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] and valet on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] prior to [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]]. He was treated terribly during his time with Jabba.

{{Char-stub}}
